reasoning: One valid author-prose bias instance was flagged, but another item invents a bias-by-omission critique without citing article text, and labels used are outside the allowed taxonomy. No attribution violations occurred.

custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-approved labels ('Loaded Language / Emotional Appeal', 'Confirmation Bias / Lack of Counterpoints') instead of the defined set (e.g., Sensationalism/Emotionalism, Bias by Omission).
